info.title: CoinDCX Spring Client API
info.description: REST API documentation for CoinDCX cryptocurrency trading platform integration. This API provides comprehensive endpoints for spot trading, futures trading, margin trading, lending, wallet management, and market data.

tags.name: User Account
tags.description: APIs for user account information and balances

tags.name: Public Market Data
tags.description: Public APIs for market data (No authentication required)

tags.name: Wallet Management
tags.description: APIs for wallet and fund transfer operations

tags.name: API Monitoring
tags.description: APIs for monitoring and analyzing API call logs and statistics

tags.name: Order Management
tags.description: APIs for creating, managing, and querying orders

tags.name: Lending
tags.description: APIs for lending and funding operations

get.description: Retrieves real-time ticker information for all available markets including last price, bid, ask, high, low, and volume

apiSecret.description: CoinDCX API Secret for request signing
